abdigor-meatballs-lezzet.name: Abdigor Meatballs
instructions: 1. Bonfile meat small parçsappeared in
2. Then the beat with the help of toning is brought to the harmony of the mink.
3. I&ccedil is added to salt and pepper.
4.  It is worth eating.
5. Large meatballs are added.
6. The juice is healthy for the preparation of the interior to the mole by adding to thefts.
7. Cookware are taken from the water drinker and the butter is added.
8. Faired rice added and left to pee.
9. The meatballs are served.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

ahi-shoyu-poke.name: Ahi Shoyu Poke
instructions: Combine ahi cubes, soy sauce, Maui onion, green onion, chile pepper, sesame oil, sesame seeds, macadamia nuts, ginger, and sea salt in a large bowl.

air-fryer-bang-bang-chicken.name: Air Fryer Bang-bang Chicken
instructions: Whisk together mayonnaise, sweet chili sauce, and Sriracha in a large bowl until sauce is well combined. Reserve 3/4 cup sauce and set aside.
Place flour into a large resealable plastic bag. Add chicken; seal the bag and shake to coat. Transfer coated chicken pieces to sauce in the large bowl and stir to combine.
Place panko bread crumbs in another large resealable plastic bag. Working in batches, drop chicken pieces into bread crumbs, seal, and shake to coat.
Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place as many chicken pieces into the air fryer basket without overcrowding.
Cook in the preheated air fryer for 10 minutes. Flip chicken and cook for 5 more minutes. Repeat with remaining chicken.
Transfer fried chicken to another large bowl and pour reserved sauce over the top. Sprinkle with green onions and toss to coat. Serve hot.

air-fryer-broiled-grapefruit.name: Air Fryer Broiled Grapefruit
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Cut grapefruit in half. Slice a thin sliver off the bottom of each half if the fruit isn't sitting flat. Use a sharp paring knife to cut around the outside edge of each half between the skin and the fruit, then cut between each segment to make it easier to eat once cooked.
Combine softened butter and 3 teaspoons brown sugar in a small bowl. Spread mixture over each grapefruit half. Sprinkle with remaining brown sugar.
Place each grapefruit half onto a 5-inch square of aluminum foil. Fold the edges of the foil up around the fruit to catch any juices. Place into the air fryer basket.
Broil in the preheated air fryer until sugar mixture is bubbling, 6 to 7 minutes. Sprinkle fruit with cinnamon before serving.

air-fryer-green-beans.name: Air Fryer Green Beans

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat air fryer to 400°. Zest 1 medium lemon into a large bowl. Cut lemon into wedges and set aside. Add 1 lb. green beans, trimmed (about 5 cups), 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, 1¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¾ tsp. freshly ground pepper to bowl and toss until beans are evenly coated.

Transfer green bean mixture to an air fryer basket, arrange in a single layer, and air-fry, shaking halfway through, until browned in spots and crisp-tender, 5–7 minutes. (If your air fryer is too small to fit all of the green beans in a single layer, cook in 2 batches.)
Taste green beans and season with more salt and pepper if needed. Transfer to a plate and sprinkle lightly with finely grated Parmesan if desired. Serve with reserved lemon wedges for squeezing over.

air-fryer-root-vegetables-with-vegan-aio.name: Air Fryer Root Vegetables With Vegan Aioli

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine mayonnaise, garlic, and lemon juice in a small bowl; season with salt and black pepper. Chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C) according to manufacturer instructions.
Combine olive oil, rosemary, garlic, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1/2 teaspoon black pepper in a small bowl; set aside to blend flavors.
Combine parsnips, potatoes, carrots, and onion in a large bowl; stir in olive oil-rosemary mixture until vegetables are evenly coated.
Place a single layer of vegetables in the air fryer basket; add a rack and another single layer of vegetables on rack. Set remaining vegetables aside. Air fry vegetables for 15 minutes.
Transfer air-fried vegetables to a plate and keep warm, or continue air frying, in 5 minute intervals, until vegetables reach desired doneness and browning.

Place remaining vegetables in a single layer in the air fryer basket, adding the rack and another single layer of vegetables if needed. Air fry until vegetables reach desired doneness and browning, about 15 minutes, checking for doneness, as needed. Serve with aioli; garnish with lemon zest.

air-fryer-steak-for-fajitas.name: Air Fryer Steak For Fajitas
instructions: Combine olive oil, salt, garlic powder, cumin, jalapeño chile powder, chili powder, and coriander in a resealable plastic bag. Add steak, onion, and bell pepper, coat with the marinade, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Marinate in the refrigerator for 8 hours to overnight.
Line an air fryer basket with a sheet of perforated parchment paper. Add marinated onion, pepper, and steak.
Air fry for 5 minutes at 204°C (200 degrees C). Remove the air fryer basket and shake to ensure even cooking. Air fry until steak is cooked through, about 4 more minutes.

air-fryer-bagel-chips.name: Air-fryer Bagel Chips
instructions: With the basket in the machine or the tray set at the center level in a toaster-oven-style model, heat an air fryer to 204°C (200°C) on the air fryer setting.

Set the bagels flat on a cutting board and slice them vertically into ¼-inch or ½-centimeter thick strips, starting at one side of each bagel and working across it. (When you get to the hole, you’ll be making half-length strips until you return to the main part of the bagel.)
Spread the slices out and generously coat them on both sides with nonstick spray.
Turn all of the slices cut side up and sprinkle the salt evenly over them.

Pour the bagel slices higgledy-piggledy into the heated machine, creating space between the overlapping slices without compacting them into layers. Air-fry for 3 minutes, then toss and/or rearrange the bagel slices on the cooking tray or in the basket.

Continue air-frying for about 4 more minutes, tossing at least twice, until golden to dark brown and noticeably crunchy. Tastes do vary. We like ours very browned; others prefer them paler. But remember: no brown = no crunch. Pour the chips onto a wire rack, spread them out, and cool for a few minutes before serving warm or at room temperature.

alheira-and-farinheira-puff-pastries-tel.name: Alheira And Farinheira Puff Pastries
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180°C. Dispose of the skin in the darkener and farinheira and, with the help of a knife, remove the fillings and mix.
Unroll the leafy masses, cut them into squares, and divide by them the filling of baler and farinheira. Fold the tips inward, forming a kind of troux, or wrap it in the form of croissant.
Lay out the foliage on a board, lined with vegetal paper, with the tips facing down, and brush it with the yolk. Take it in the oven for 20 minutes until it's golden.

almond-cake-with-apricot-sauce-lezzet.name: Almond Cake With Apricot Sauce
instructions: 1. Take a deep rough cockroach with a tiny tiny swamp.
2. Wait for a while in room heat for softening.
3. Add dust sugar and rub it until it becomes cream.
4. Add flour, almond flour, dry yeast and eggs.
5. Mix until it becomes a lumpless snowpiece with the mixer.
6. Adjust and heat the body to 180 degrees.
7. Oil 6 small moulds with heat resistant.
8. Share the prepared dough into the molds.
9. Cover the mold with oily paper and cook for 35-40 minutes in the oven.
10. Check if it does not shovel from curing to the middle.
11. 11.   Mix the liquor in a container with the portakal water.
12. Wait for about 30 minutes until they are added and softened.
12. August Take a fine slice of 3 apricots.
14 July Add milk cream and powder sugar to the remaining mixture and pull it on the robot.
15. Share the sauce serving plates you prepared.
16. Place the cake from mould to die plates.
17. September Decorate and serve with the apricots you slice.
18.  Afiyet olsun.

almond-flour-chocolate-chip-muffins.name: Almond Flour Chocolate Chip Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line 10 muffin cups with paper liners.
Sift 3 cups almond flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda together into a bowl; set aside.

Beat sugar, melted butter, Greek yogurt, eggs, and vanilla extract together in a bowl with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy; beat in flour mixture until well combined, being careful not to overmix.

Toss ¾ cup chocolate chips and 1 tablespoon almond flour together in a bowl until chips are lightly coated; fold into batter. Spoon batter into the prepared cups, filling each to the top. Sprinkle remaining ¼ cup chocolate chips over muffin tops.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5 minutes, then reduce heat to 177°C (175 degrees C). Continue baking until tops are golden and a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, 12 to 15 minutes.
Cool muffins in the tin on a wire rack for at least 5 minutes before serving.

almond-marzipan-cookie.name: Almond Marzipan Cookie
instructions: Mash butter into flour in a large bowl with a pastry cutter or 2 forks until mixture resembles small peas. Gradually add ice-cold water, stirring lightly until mixture is moist enough to form a ball. Place pastry ball into a medium bowl and cover the bowl with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
Mix together almond paste, sugar, eggs, and almond extract in a separate bowl until well combined. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease 2 baking sheets.
Divide pastry ball into 10 portions. Using a rolling pin, roll each portion into long strips measuring about 4x12-inches.
Divide almond paste mixture into 10 portions; use your hands to form each portion into a snake shape.

Place each almond 'snake' into the center of each pastry strip. Fold dough over and seal the seam, also closing the ends; a little water will help to hold the seal. Arrange rolls, seam-side down, onto the prepared baking sheets. Cut slits into rolls with scissors every 2 inches.
Beat together egg white and water in a small bowl until well combined; brush over pastry rolls to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 20 to 25 minutes. Set aside to cool completely before slicing at each slit.

and-cake-teleculinaria.name: And Cake
instructions: Light the water until it starts boiling. Remove from the fire, add poppy and tape seeds for 1 hour. Preheat the oven at 175oC.

In a bowl, beat the butter with sugar, until it gets creamy. Gather the seeds and stir. Add the eggs, one by one, beating between each addition. Add the vanilla essence and finally the flour, with yeast and salt. Involve without knocking.

Place the dough in a shape (20x20 cm), previously greased with butter and sprinkled with flour, and put it in the oven for 45 minutes, or until the toothpick is dry. Take it off, let it cool, unshape it and serve it.

and-delicious-roast-chicken-recipe-comed.name: And Delicious Roast Chicken Recipe
and-delicious-roast-chicken-recipe-comed.original_name: Receta de pollo asado fácil y delicioso
instructions: It purifies the oven at 200 degrees Celsius.

First you have to clear up the chicken. Although your trustworthy butcher will have been sure to sell you clear and ready to eat, there's always guts, feathers and extra fat to get rid of, get care of that.
Once I clean up, you have to have no water at the time to put it in the oven.

Feed the chicken with thyme, oregano, salt and pepper at your best. Add an olive oil chorrit and fry it well so that everything will be spread by both spices and oil. Don't forget to do this with the chicken inside as well.
Put the chicken on a plate where it's comfortable and covered with aluminum paper.
Mete el pollo en el horno y cocina por 45 minutos.
After this time, remove the paper and turn the chicken with care to avoid a disaster as happened to a friend. Let her cook another half an hour.

At this point and depending on your oven, the chicken could be roasted. You can check this by inserting a paddle into his flesh to see if blood comes from his inside. If you have a doubt let them cook a few more minutes, always out.
Once ready, turn off the oven and let it rest 10 minutes.

anything-goes-donabe.name: Anything Goes Donabe

ingredients.prep: 2 thinly sliced on a steep diagonal, 2 sliced 2 inches thick

ingredients.item: -ounce red snapper or black bass fillet

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thigh, cut into 1-inch pieces
peeled, halved crosswise, thinly sliced lengthwise

instructions: Place noodles in a large bowl and add cold water to cover; let soak 15 minutes. Drain.
Meanwhile, combine dashi, mirin, and soy sauce in a medium bowl.
Place thinly sliced scallions in a small bowl and add cold water to cover. Soak until they begin to curl, 8–10 minutes. Drain; squeeze to remove excess water.
Lay cabbage in a large donabe or Dutch oven. Arrange clams, shrimp, snapper, chicken, tofu, mushrooms, carrot, 2" scallion pieces, and noodles on top; add dashi mixture.
Cover donabe and heat over medium-high until liquid is just simmering. Uncover, reduce heat to low, and gently simmer until clams open and chicken and fish are cooked through, 5–8 minutes.
Serve topped with drained scallions.

apple-crumble.name: Apple Crumble
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Pile sliced apples in an 8x10-inch casserole dish. Mix water and lemon juice together and sprinkle over apples.

To make the crumble topping: Combine sugar, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt in a mixing bowl. Mix well using an electric mixer. Add butter pieces and mix until mixture is crumbly; sprinkle evenly over apples.
Bake in the preheated oven until apples are bubbling and crumble topping is golden brown and crisp, about 45 minutes. Let cool slightly to thicken before serving in bowls.

apple-pancake-lezzet.name: Apple Pancake
instructions: 1. Peel off the shells of apples &pardil; cut into cut off and round slices.
2. Apple slices, sugar, vanilla and water cook in the middle fire 6-7 minutes.
3. Take the apple slices from the pan and leave the paper towel u on the floor.
4. Covered for shield pankek, baking powder, vanilla and sugar in a bowl.
5. Eggs, milk and melted butter in a separate bowl rremove.
6. Add flour mixture and mix well.
7. Heat the unsticked yüstain the pan.
8. Brush with very light moonerpe oil creep and dough to 2 mins of pan and place an apple slice.
9. Front cook until the backlight is fed.
10. Repeat the same process until the dough and apple slices are finished.
11. 11. Serve your service.

apple-pie-cider.name: Apple Pie Cider
instructions: Combine apple juice, apple cider, sugar, and cinnamon sticks in a large pot. Bring to a boil, remove from heat, and let cool completely.
Once cool, stir in grain alcohol.

apple-pie-with-puff-pastry-and-pastry-cr.name: Apple Pie With Puff Pastry And Pastry Cream
apple-pie-with-puff-pastry-and-pastry-cr.original_name: Tarta de manzana con hojaldre y crema pastelera

ingredients.item: 4 manzanas tipo golden o royal gala
40 g fine maize or maicene flour

instructions: We mix egg yolks with fine corn flour and 150 ml of milk. Let's have a reservation. We put 350 ml of milk (what we had) in a bowl with lemon skin, sugar and vanilla and lead to boiling. We put the fire down a little and we put the reserved mix up and put them down and we'll mix with some rods. We continue to mix up till the mixture thickens, a soft and clumsy cream should be left. We get out of the fire and let him get warmer.
We extend the plate and cut into rectangular portions of the size you like, I usually do four. We bend the four edges inwards and spread at the centre some pastry cream.
Encima colocamos la manzana cortada en gajos finos. Pincelamos la manzana y los bordes con un poco de mermelada de albaricoque, que calentamos un poco en el microondas previamente para licuarla.
We have only to put our apple pits with pajeldre into the pressurized oven about 15 minutes at 200ºC. When we see that the pint's golden we get out.
apple-pie-with-puff-pastry-and-pastry-cr.category: Easy Beer Recipes, Home Stretch Recipes

apple-molasses-upside-down-cake.name: Apple-molasses Upside-down Cake
instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 350°. Melt butter in a 10-inch (as measured across the bottom) cast-iron or other ovenproof skillet; set aside. Whisk flour, salt, cinnamon, baking soda, and baking powder in a medium bowl.
Whisk molasses, egg, ginger, and 1/4 cup sugar in a large bowl. Whisk in sour cream, then milk. Gradually whisk in dry ingredients, then 3 tablespoons melted butter from skillet. Set aside.

Place 1 apple on a work surface stem up. Cut a large piece of apple from 1 side, leaving core behind. Rotate apple and repeat twice for a total of 3 large pieces (a triangular core will remain). Repeat with remaining apples.

Add remaining 1/4 cup sugar to butter in skillet. Cook over medium-high heat until sugar begins to caramelize, 2-3 minutes. Add apples; stir to coat. Cook apples rounded sides down for 3 minutes, then turn over and cook flat sides down until beginning to soften, about 5 minutes longer. Space apples evenly in skillet flat side down and pour cake batter over.
Transfer skillet to oven. Bake until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out with a few moist crumbs attached, 30-40 minutes.
Let cake cool in skillet for 10 minutes, then carefully invert onto a plate. Serve cake warm or at room temperature.

apricot-and-yogurt-cake-teleculinaria.name: Apricot And Yogurt Cake
instructions: Garnish a form with butter and sprinkle with flour. Heat the oven to 180 degrees. Lay the eggs in a bowl, add the sugar and beat well until you get a cute, off-white cream. Then add the flour and yeast and wrap it very well.
Cut the apricots to pieces. Add the yogurts to the pasta, then the apricots and the oil and mix well until you get a consistent dough.
Verta para a forma e leve ao forno durante 35 minutos. Verifique a cozedura, retire e sirva decorado a gosto.

arabic-pies-with-3-ingredients-argiro.name: Arabic Pies With 3 Engineers

ingredients.item: Water as long as it takes (about 2/3 of the cup)
Water as long as it takes (about 2/3 of the cup)

instructions: Arab yeast-free pie is an unleaned dough that means a dough without any swelling.
The use of the yeast will give a little more fluffy dough.
Add the flower and salt to a bowl.
Mix with a spoon.
Add the water and ferment.
Once the dough's in a ball, we put it on the work bench.
Bake for 5’ until the dough is smooth and does not stick in the hands.
Place the duck in a bowl.
Cover it and let it stand for 30 minutes to rest.
Divide the dough into 6 pieces.
Open each piece of dough in thin sheet with the Mulder.
Add minimum flour to the work bench whenever necessary so that the pie does not stick.
Heat a large non-stick pan over medium heat.
Touch 1-1 pie in the hot pan.
Bake without oil for 2’ and turn over.
Bake from the other side
We make the rest.

arctic-char-with-greens-and-gribiche-dre.name: Arctic Char With Greens And Gribiche Dressing
instructions: Season fish with salt and pepper. Swirl oil in a cold large nonstick skillet to coat; lay in fish in pan, skin side down. Set over medium heat and cook fish, occasionally pressing down lightly (lightly!) on fillets to ensure skin is in even contact with pan, until skin is deep golden brown and flesh is opaque around the edges, 6–8 minutes. Turn fillets and cook just until opaque on flesh side, about 1 minute longer. Transfer to a platter.
Gently toss greens in a medium bowl with enough dressing to lightly coat; season with salt and pepper. Scatter over fish and spoon some additional dressing on top.

artichoke-florentine-pasta.name: Artichoke Florentine Pasta

ingredients.item: Campbell’s flavorup!™ caramelized onion & burgundy wine cooking concentrate

ingredients.prep: plus 2 tablespoons, divided, plus more for garnish
cooked according to package instructions, drained

instructions: In a medium bowl, combine ¼ cup (10 g) spinach, the parsley, Campbell’s FlavorUp!™ Caramelized Onion & Burgundy Wine Cooking Concentrate, 2 tablespoons of Parmesan cheese, the garlic, lemon juice, black pepper, red pepper flakes, 2 tablespoons of olive oil, and the crème fraîche. Stir until smooth and light in color.
In a medium saucepan over medium heat, sauté the remaining 1½ cups (60 g) of spinach until wilted, 1–2 minutes. Remove the spinach from the pan.

Heat the remaining ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil in the same pan over medium-high heat until shimmering. Add ½ cup (85 g) of the artichoke hearts and fry until golden brown, 3–5 minutes. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain.
To the same pan, add the cooked pasta, remaining ¼ cup Parmesan cheese, remaining ½ cup artichoke hearts, the sautéed spinach, and the sauce and toss until well-combined.
Divide the pasta among serving bowls and garnish with the fried artichoke hearts and more Parmesan cheese.
Enjoy!

artichokes-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Artichokes In The Oven

ingredients.item: 1 Mash fresh onions with their leaves
1 Mash fresh onions with their leaves

instructions: The first thing we do to make the artichoke lemons with potatoes in the evening is to clean the artichokes.
After cleaning them, pour them into plenty of water with 2-3 twisted lemons, so they don't come in oxidized.
Clean, Wash and cut the potatoes into large bites.
Rinse the artichokes and add them to a small pot along with the potatoes.
Add the fresh onions cut into slides, fresh garlic, salt and pepper and pour with the olive oil.
Break the cherry tomatoes with the Fingers and add them to the hall.
Add half a cup of water.
Cover the meal with the fennel bronzes.
Place the lead on the hall and bake in the evening at 200oC for about 35 minutes.
Uncover, pour the juice from 2 lemons and bake for about 25 minutes until the ingredients soften and the lemons remain artichokes with potatoes only with their oil.

arugula-salad-with-prosciutto-blue-chees.name: Arugula Salad With Prosciutto, Blue Cheese, And Pear
instructions: Coarsely chop chives and put in a food processor. Add olive oil and purée for 1 minute. Transfer to a squeeze bottle dispenser and set aside.
Evenly distribute arugula onto 4 medium plates. Top with prosciutto and blue cheese.
Peel and core pears, then cut in half. Cut each half into thin slices and add to plates in a fan shape.
Drizzle chive olive oil over each salad and decoratively add some to the sides of the plates. Repeat with balsamic glaze.

asparagus-au-gratin-argiro.name: Asparagus Au Gratin
instructions: In a pot melt the butter and as soon as it foams, add the flower.
Bake the flower for 1-2 minutes, stringing continuously with a wire. Then, remove the pot from the heat and gradually add the warm milk, stringing continuously.
Add the pot back to heat and allow the mixture to thinken. Salt and add some nutmeg.
Remove from heat and add the grated cheeses, starring until they melt. Cover it with membrane, making sure it touches the surface of the bechamel so that the skin does not form.
Preheat the evening to 200°C to make the asparagus.
Wash the fresh asparagus and clear them with the special peeling accessories. Remove about 1/3 from the bottom of the cot.
In a pot with salted building water, immerse the asparagus, lower the heat and simmer for about 10 minutes.
Drain the asparagus well in a colander and tampon with abstract paper.
Lay a number of asparagus in a buttered refractory vessel. Pour with the bechamel and, if you want, sprinkle a few crambs of sale bread for a crisper result.
Bake for about 20 minutes, until the surface is brightly golden

autumn-gin-sour.name: Autumn Gin Sour
instructions: Combine gin, lemon juice, and Grand Marnier in a large pitcher; chill until very cold, at least 2 hours and up to 1 day. Mix egg whites in a small jar; chill until cold.

For each cocktail, shake 2½ oz. gin mixture, ½ oz. egg white, and 1 tsp. marmalade in a cocktail shaker until very frothy, about 1 minute. Fill with ice; shake until outside is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a coupe glass.
*Raw egg is not recommended for the elderly, people with weakened immune systems…or people who don’t like raw egg.

avocado-corn-salsa.name: Avocado Corn Salsa
instructions: In a large bowl, mix corn, olives, red bell pepper and onion.
In a small bowl, mix garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, cider vinegar, oregano, salt and pepper. Pour into the corn mixture and toss to coat. Cover and chill in the refrigerator 8 hours, or overnight.
Stir avocados into the mixture before serving.

avocado-with-string-cheese-lezzet.name: Avocado With String Cheese
instructions: 1. Peel the bark of avocado and cut it into two.
2. Öin orange juice,then powder to sugar,then smear the brunette powder into sugar.
3. Cook the cheese and Erzurum wire cheese in the oven set to 180 degrees.
4. Rent a car in the area of the city.

ayva-kalye-lezzet.name: Ayva Kalye
instructions: 1. Get to the pot.
2. roast the water left in the middle fire to the veccedil.
3. Add salt and mix.
4. Mix the breaksses of water grape.
5.  Ete ilave edin.
6. Cook until the meat softens.
7. Peel the shell of the moon and cut it into eight slices.
8. Add erythroach in the pan and add slices oftri and fry to lightly.
9. Add the lunar slices together with oil.
10. Cook until the weekends are softened.
11. 11. Serve hot.
